name: Rescue Hedgehog
name_jp: レスキューヘッジホッグ
desc: You can banish this card you control; Special Summon 2 Level 3 or lower monsters from your Deck with the same Type, Attribute, and Level as each other (1 Normal Monster and 1 Effect Monster), but their effects are negated, also destroy them during the End Phase. You can only use this effect of "Rescue Hedgehog" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can banish this card you control; Special Summon 2 Level 3 or lower monsters from your Deck with the same Type, Attribute, and Level as each other (1 Normal Monster and 1 Effect Monster), but their effects are negated, also destroy them during the End Phase. You can only use this effect of "Rescue Hedgehog" once per turn.
eff: You can banish this card you control; Special Summon 2 Level 3 or lower monsters from your Deck with the same Type, Attribute, and Level as each other (1 Normal Monster and 1 Effect Monster), but their effects are negated, also destroy them during the End Phase. You can only use this effect of "Rescue Hedgehog" once per turn.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
banished: Banishes itself from field for cost
